title: JS Method, Spel Class
description: Jump Sense detects whether the arm stopped prior to completing a JUMP instruction (which used a SENSE input) or if the arm completed the JUMP move.
see_also:
Jump

Jump3

Jump3CP

Sense

Till

JS Example

VB Example:

With m_spel

  .Sense("Sw(1) = On")

  .Jump("P1 Sense")

  stoppedOnSense = .JS()

End With

C# Example:

m_spel.Sense("Sw(1) = On");

m_spel.Jump("P1 Sense");

stoppedOnSense = m_spel.JS();
examples:
With m_spel .Sense("Sw(1) = On") .Jump("P1 Sense") stoppedOnSense = .JS()
End With
